source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two power plants jointly supply power to a load, with the per-unit values of parameters shown in the figure. Given \( Z_1 = 0.1 + \mathrm{j} 0.4 \), \( Z_2 = 0.04 + \mathrm{j} 0.08 \), and assuming the bus voltages of the power plants are both 1.0, the load power is \( S_{\mathrm{L}} = 1.2 + \mathrm{j} 1.7 \). The active power portion is equally shared by the two power plants. Determine the optimal distribution of reactive power (neglecting reactive power losses in the network).
